name: ai-orchestrator
description: Production-grade multi-provider AI orchestration platform with Browser Intelligence OS

commands.setup: source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -e '.[dev]' && playwright install chromium --with-deps

chat.description: Send prompt to all providers in parallel via chat endpoint
chat.command: source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import asyncio, httpx; import json; async def main(): async with httpx.AsyncClient() as c: r = await c.post('http://localhost:8000/chat', json={'prompt': 'What is 2+2? Reply in ONE word.', 'providers': ['chatgpt_ui', 'deepseek_ui', 'qwen_ui', 'kimi_ui', 'z_ai_ui', 'xiaomimimo_ui', 'minimax_ui', 'local_llm'], 'parallel': True, 'mock_mode': True}); print(json.dumps(r.json(), indent=2)); asyncio.run(main())"

browser-test.description: Test browser intelligence engine with mock mode
browser-test.command: source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "from ai_orchestrator.browser_intelligence.engine import BrowserIntelligenceEngine; e = BrowserIntelligenceEngine(); print('BrowserIntelligenceEngine instantiated OK'); print('States:', e.state_probabilities()); print('Ready:', e.is_ready_for_prompt)"

provider-test.description: Test all UI adapters in mock mode sequentially
provider-test.command: source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import asyncio; from ai_orchestrator.adapters import *; from ai_orchestrator.adapters.engine_adapter import EngineUIAdapter; async def test(): adapters = [ChatGPTUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), DeepSeekUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), QwenUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), KimiUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), ZAIUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), XiaomiMiMoUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), MiniMaxUIAdapter(mock_mode=True), LocalLLMAdapter(mock_mode=True)]; results = await EngineUIAdapter.fan_out(adapters, 'What is 2+2? Reply in one word.'); [print(f'{r.model}: {r.content[:60]}') for r in results]; asyncio.run(test())"
